testcase.name: Logout successfully
testcase.system-out: Given user opens login page.................................................passed When user enters username "admin" and password "pass".......................passed And user selects language "Default - English (Standard)"....................passed And user clicks login button................................................passed Then user should see dashboard page.........................................passed And user logs out...........................................................passed

testcase.name: Successful login
testcase.system-out: Given user opens login page.................................................passed When user enters username "admin" and password "pass".......................passed And user selects language "Default - English (Standard)"....................passed And user clicks login button................................................passed Then user should see dashboard page.........................................passed

testcase.name: Successful login
testcase.system-out: Given user opens login page.................................................passed When user enters username "admin" and password "pass".......................passed And user selects language "Default - English (Standard)"....................passed And user clicks login button................................................passed Then user should see dashboard page.........................................passed

testcase.name: Add new patient successfully
testcase.system-out: Given user opens login page.................................................passed When user enters username "admin" and password "pass".......................passed And user selects language "Default - English (Standard)"....................passed And user clicks login button................................................passed Then user should see dashboard page.........................................passed When user navigates to patient section......................................passed And user enters patient details "Reza", "Karim", "1988-05-05", "Male".......passed And saves the patient.......................................................passed Then patient should be added successfully...................................passed

testcase.name: Add patient with missing mandatory fields
testcase.system-out: Given user opens login page.................................................passed When user enters username "admin" and password "pass".......................passed And user selects language "Default - English (Standard)"....................passed And user clicks login button................................................passed Then user should see dashboard page.........................................passed When user navigates to patient section......................................passed And user enters patient details "", "Karim", "1988-05-05", "Male"...........passed And saves the patient.......................................................passed Then user should see error message "First Name is required".................passed
